VGBND.SettingDTRHint: When enabled, imported characters will use Foundry's Dynamic Token Ring, with the ring colour set to the importing user's player colour.
VGBND.SettingDTRScaleHint: Scale of the character portrait inside the Dynamic Token Ring. 1.0 fills the inner area; lower values shrink the portrait away from the ring edge.
VGBND.UnresolvedSearch: These items had no exact compendium match. Search for them below, or create a blank item to fill in manually.
VGBND.CreatedItem: Blank item "{name}" created — fill it in manually.
VGBND.ErrorLoginMissing: Please enter your email and password.
VGBND.OpenUrlTitle: Open character JSON in a new tab
VGBND.JSONPlaceholder: Copy all text from the opened tab and paste it here.
VGBND.CORSHint: Direct fetch was blocked by the browser. Open the URL with the arrow button, copy all text from that page, and paste it below.
VGBND.ErrorNoInput: Enter a character UUID or URL.
VGBND.ErrorInvalidUUID: Could not extract a valid UUID from the input.
VGBND.NoCharacters: No characters found in your account.
VGBND.NoGroups: You are not a member of any groups.
VGBND.NoGroupChars: No characters found for this group's members.
VGBND.SelectGroup: Select a group on the left to view its characters.
VGBND.ErrorCORSFallback: Direct fetch blocked — opening in a new tab. Copy the JSON and use Import by UUID if needed.
VGBND.SyncNoneFound: No Vagabond-imported actors found in this world.
VGBND.SyncTooltip: Push current character state back to Vagabond Tag Along
VGBND.SyncNotImported: This actor was not imported from Vagabond Tag Along — cannot sync.
VGBND.SyncNotSignedIn: Not signed in to Vagabond Tag Along. Open the browser dialog and sign in first.
VGBND.SyncErrorFetch: Could not read character from Vagabond: {error}
VGBND.SettingExportTemplateHint: Choose between the dark or light hero record sheet.
VGBND.SettingExportFolderHint: Firefox fallback only — a Save As dialog is used on all other browsers. Sets the folder inside your Foundry data directory where PDFs are saved when the dialog is unavailable.
VGBND.SettingUseCorsProxyName: Use CORS Proxy for URL Import
VGBND.SettingUseCorsProxyHint: When enabled, URL-tab imports route through a public CORS proxy so they work in browser-mode Foundry (vgbnd.app does not send CORS headers, so browser-mode fetches are otherwise blocked). Your character JSON will pass through the proxy service. Leave off if you use Foundry desktop or prefer the manual paste fallback.
VGBND.SettingCorsProxyUrlHint: URL prefix used when 'Use CORS Proxy' is enabled. The character API URL is appended (URL-encoded) to this prefix. Default targets api.codetabs.com (free public proxy). Change only if you run your own proxy or prefer a different service.
VGBND.ExportErrorNotCharacter: Please select a character actor to export.
